flags.summary: First-year retention at Nueta Hidatsa Sahnish College fell 100% between 2014 and 2017 (100.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Nueta Hidatsa Sahnish College fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (10.9% → 7.3%).

flags.label: 10-year median earnings
flags.summary: 10-year median earnings at Nueta Hidatsa Sahnish College rose 39% between 2011 and 2014 ($20.6k → $28.6k).
